column1: # AgSteer OTA Partition Table for LilyGO T-ETH-Lite-S3 (16 MB Flash)
# After a successful OTA update the bootloader reads otadata to decide
# which slot (ota_0 or ota_1) to boot.  If the new firmware does not
# call ESP.restart() or Update.end(true) is never reached (power loss
# crash) the old slot is kept – built-in rollback safety.
